name: GitHub PR Review - Tri-Model Council (DeepSeek-R1 + Qwen3 + Kimi K2)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'deepseek-v3.2', prompt: $('Prepare Prompts').item.json.modelPrompts.deepseek_r1.prompt, stream: false, options: { temperature: $('Prepare Prompts').item.json.modelPrompts.deepseek_r1.temperature, num_predict: 2048 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen3', prompt: $('Prepare Prompts').item.json.modelPrompts.qwen3.prompt, stream: false, options: { temperature: $('Prepare Prompts').item.json.modelPrompts.qwen3.temperature, num_predict: 2048 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'kimi-k2', prompt: $('Prepare Prompts').item.json.modelPrompts.kimi_k2.prompt, stream: false, options: { temperature: $('Prepare Prompts').item.json.modelPrompts.kimi_k2.temperature, num_predict: 4096 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ pr_number: $json.prNumber, pr_title: $json.prTitle, pr_author: $json.prAuthor, repo_name: $json.repoOwner + '/' + $json.repoName, deepseek_score: $json.scores.deepseek, qwen_score: $json.scores.qwen, kimi_score: $json.scores.kimi, final_verdict: $json.finalVerdict, winner_model: $json.winner }) }}
